title: DDC — Shared Definitions
description: Reusable JSON Schema definitions shared across NYC Department of Design and Construction (DDC) object schemas. Reconciles fields common to the DDC Open Data datasets (data.cityofnewyork.us), nyc.gov/site/ddc, and the citywide vendor/procurement systems DDC solicits through (PASSPort/MOCS, City Record, Checkbook NYC). Includes the NYC geography spine and DDC's own project/contract keys (Project ID, PIN).

x-nyc-commons.note: Geography/identifier/address/money definitions are $ref'd from the canonical nyc-commons set; agency-specific definitions remain local.

Borough.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/Borough); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Borough still resolve.

Coordinates.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/Coordinates); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Coordinates still resolve.

Geography.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/GeographySpine); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Geography still resolve.

Division.description: DDC line of business ('Division') — the two capital portfolios plus support divisions.

ProjectPhase.description: Where the capital project sits in the design-through-construction lifecycle ('Phase').

Money.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (money.json#/$defs/MoneyUSD); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Money still resolve.

ContractReference.description: A reference to a DDC procurement by its identifiers.

pin.description: Procurement Identification Number ('PIN') — the citywide contract key.

description.description: Short scope/title of the contract or project.

Firm.description: A private-sector firm doing business with DDC — designer, engineer, construction manager, contractor, subcontractor, or allied consultant.

role.description: Role on the engagement (Designer, Engineer, CM, Contractor, Subcontractor, Consultant).

mwbe.description: Minority/Women-Owned Business Enterprise designation, where known.
